ab: ṟumungi’ cu maras ci papatas la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: pakaciki’ mi’ su.
en: I can lend you.

ab: ṟumungi’ cu maras ci pataṟak la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini cu aras uṟi, hata’ miniy aw.
en: B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.

ab: hata’ miniy ci papatas aw?
en: A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: ho’, pabiniy cu ci papuṟut uṟi na.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: hata’ miniy ci nani’un sasan aw?
en: A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: minnani’ cu moṟow kung la, aṟat cu.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.

ab: ṟumungi’ cu musa pakakilux ci ka tinbihlan mu la.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: inah haṟi’ hali’ pakakilux ga!
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: ṟumungi’ cu maras ci ka tinbihlan la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: pagagaluw ta mami’ ci ka tinbihlan mu la!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!

ab: amol ka nani’un su cakan rex?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: pakani cu ci tinnahuk na papasba’an ci ke’.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: amol ka nani’un su cakan rex?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: pagagaluw ta mani ga, nel cu maras ci tinbihlan!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!

ab: hata’ pasboru’ aw?
en: A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?

ab: ho’, hata’ ga!
en: B: Okay! Let’s go.

ab: hata’ pasboru’ aw?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: aṟat cu wa, maha’ cu lunpuw ci patas.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: siagal cu ci cacopah aw?
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: ho’, ni’ ka cacopah hani.
en: B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: ita ka gali’ haca aw?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: agal sa si Pawan, nel cu cumopah hang.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor, you ask Pawan to carry it for you.

ab: masu’ su cumopah la?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: masu’ cu la.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: hunco’ su ini’ copah isu’?
en: A: Why don’t you clean up?

ab: masu’ cu cumopah kung la.
en: B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: awi’ tikiy ka raxal hani, maṟukat la.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: ho’, maha’ cu magal ci ka gali’ hang.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: maṟukat caṟung ka garasu’ hani, awi tikiy.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: iya’ hang kay, ini’ cu tamasu’ cumopah na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.

ab: pisco’ su kira’haṟi’ la?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: mamaha cu malahang ci ka sinsi’.
en: B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: pisco’ su malax papasba’an ci ke’ la?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: mamaha min mawas ci ka rangi’ mu.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: pisco’ i malax papasba’an ci ke’ ka hiya la?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?

ab: mamaha’ lumanguy ka hiya’.
en: B: He’s going swimming.
